title: rubus idaeus var. viburnifolius
intro: Rubus idaeus var. viburnifolius, also known as the raspberry leaf viburnum or raspberry leaf, is a variant of the raspberry plant, characterized by its viburnum-like leaves and medicinal properties. The leaves of this plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rubus idaeus var. viburnifolius are numerous and include easing menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and supporting uterine health, making it a popular herbal remedy among women. The leaves can be prepared as a tea, infused in hot water or used in herbal remedies, offering a natural and safe way to harness its medicinal properties.
